seoTitle: Winwill vs Winya — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Winwill and Winya. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Winwill and Winya.
heading: Winwill vs Winya — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Winwill, Queensland and Winya, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Winya has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Winwill (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Winwill or Winya safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Winwill has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Winya scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Winwill scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Winya scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Winwill or Winya?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Winya has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
